title: Wave 5a — Swap gateway
goal: Expose swap quote and guarded swap proposal flows through the Compass MCP gateway with policy, approval metadata, and audit.

reviewBudget.warning: Combined Wave 5 was requested, but swap and conditional must remain reviewable tracks. Pause and split before implementation if this track plus tests is forecast above 400 changed lines.

tasks.title: Add RED swap gateway tests
tasks.description: Specify allow, high-slippage approval, unknown-token approval, missing-context fail-closed, metadata fingerprints, and no legacy imports before implementation.

evidence.actual: RED as expected: focused swap gateway tests collected and failed because back/services/swapGateway.ts and back/services/swapGatewayContracts.ts did not exist yet (6 failed / 0 passed).

tasks.title: Implement swap contracts and gateway
tasks.description: Create swapGatewayContracts.ts and swapGateway.ts with evaluateSwapGateway mirroring transferGateway while keeping types separate from behavior.

evidence.actual: GREEN: swap gateway tests passed for separated contracts, ALLOW known SOL/USDC, high-slippage REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, unknown-token REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, missing-context REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT, metadata fingerprints, and no legacy imports (6 passed / 1 file).

tasks.title: Add RED MCP swap tests
tasks.description: Specify tools/list and tools/call behavior for quote_swap and guarded_swap_sol_usdc, including audit and direct-signing regression.

evidence.expected: RED until swap tools are registered/routed
evidence.actual: RED as expected: MCP tests failed because quote_swap and guarded_swap_sol_usdc were not registered/routed yet (4 failed / 7 passed).

tasks.title: Register and route swap tools
tasks.description: Extend MCP contracts, registry, router, and approval metadata typing for swap results without changing signer behavior.

evidence.actual: GREEN: MCP registry/router tests passed with quote_swap and guarded_swap_sol_usdc listed and routed, quote ALLOW, guarded swap REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL, invalid swap REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT, and signing/unknown-tool regressions (11 passed / 2 files).

tasks.title: Validate and pause for review
tasks.description: Run full validation and stop for parent review before conditional implementation if combined diff approaches the review budget.

evidence.actual: PASS: focused Wave 5a swap + MCP suites passed (22 tests / 4 files).

evidence.expected: PASS focused swap/MCP/server tests after reviewer blocker fix
evidence.actual: PASS: focused Wave 5a swap + MCP suites passed after adding unsupported pair regression (23 tests / 4 files).
PASS: full backend Vitest suite passed after unsupported pair fix (108 tests / 11 files).
PASS with existing app/layout.tsx react-refresh/only-export-components warning; 0 errors.
PASS: TypeScript no-emit completed with no errors.

acceptanceCriteria: Swap tools are first-party MCP tools and never legacy chat flows.
Sensitive swaps pass through evaluateAction using actionKind swap.
High slippage, unknown token, unallowed protocol, and missing evidence produce conservative decisions.
Audit output is structured and redacted.
